name: phantex
summary: Repository indexing entry for the ``phantex`` project. Index entry in the KFIOSA catalog. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner. Attribution and provenance only; audit code, releases, and licence before use in the lab or production environment.

usage_sections.content: flask --app phantex.app:create_app run (or: uv run flask --app phantex.app:create_app run); web UI at http://localhost:5000

examples.command: flask --app phantex.app:create_app run (or: uv run flask --app phantex.app:create_app run); web UI at http://localhost:5000

language: Python (with JavaScript/CSS/HTML frontend built via Vite)
algorithms: classic Bluetooth scan via hcitool (may need CAP_NET_RAW)
produces: Web dashboard listing nearby Bluetooth devices at /bt
no structured/logged WiFi output — none implemented
novelty: none — thin wrapper. Bluetooth side just shells out to hcitool/bluez; the WiFi recon surface advertised in the description does not exist in the codebase yet (marked Coming soon), so it offers zero capability beyond the airodump-ng/wash/hcxtools/scapy baseline KFIOSA already uses.

trust.warning: External community repo. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use. Catalogued for the AI's awareness; novel algorithms are implemented in core/modules/catalog_recon.py, not shelled out to this repo's binaries.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
